spec_match.rationale: The page now pairs the before/after UI gallery with a real Secure Payment Confirmation PaymentRequest construction probe, canMakePayment() readout, and non-HTTPS payeeOrigin rejection branch without invoking show().

interactive.rationale: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp on Chrome 148.0.0.0: merchant, amount, currency, and card inputs update both dialogs; Confirm and Authorise buttons update a live status; the SPC request probe button reports valid and invalid request branches.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates and delivers on the framing used in the feature index card.

edge_cases.rationale: Invalid amount, malformed currency, and short card last-4 values are surfaced as blocked fallback states before PaymentRequest is constructed; the probe also displays unsupported API fallback and non-HTTPS payeeOrigin validation errors.

references.rationale: The concept page now cites https://chromestatus.com/feature/5206050462236672, matching the feature page and conformance route.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex of note, and button overrides keep background + color paired (CLAUDE.md rules 5 and 6).

summary: Repaired and re-reviewed with chrome-devtools-mcp. Before the fix, the inline script threw `Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected token ')'`, transaction fields stayed empty after editing, and the ChromeStatus link pointed to feature 5145018724319232. After the fix, the page has a clean console/network load, correct feature 5206050462236672 link, live dialog updates, working simulated Confirm/Authorise actions, visible invalid-input fallback states, an SPC PaymentRequest/canMakePayment probe, and the feature conformance route reports 10 pass / 0 fail.
